task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new unified workspace hierarchy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new main workspace named 'Integrated Operations' in the workspace list or navigation tree, containing sub-workspaces named 'Product Development' and 'Corporate Services'.

task_completion.description: Verify that documents from the legacy Alpha and Beta divisions have been moved or recreated in the new workspace structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Integrated Operations' workspace (and its sub-workspaces) to see various documents (e.g., project plans, roadmaps, budget reports) populating the folders, indicating successful migration.

task_completion.description: Verify that documents in the new structure have descriptions of at least 20 characters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the document properties, metadata panel, or list view for the migrated documents. The 'Description' field should be populated with text that is visibly 20 characters or longer.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'integrated-team' user group with combined membership.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the User/Group Management interface. There should be a group named 'integrated-team' and its membership list should show multiple users (members previously from alpha-team and beta-team, such as acohen, mgarcia, tchen).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'integrated-team' group has ReadWrite access to the consolidated workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the permissions, ACL, or sharing settings for the 'Integrated Operations' workspace. The 'integrated-team' group should be listed with 'ReadWrite' (or equivalent read and write) access privileges.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the document management system's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web interface of the document repository/workspace manager being navigated and clicked, rather than terminal windows executing API or database commands.

integrity.description: Ensure metadata was edited through the proper document properties interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for form submissions or edit panels for document metadata, confirming the agent didn't just rename the files or write a text file claiming the metadata was updated.

integrity.description: Ensure the user group was created and populated using the admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the group creation forms and user assignment checkboxes/lists being actively used in the system's administration panel.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target workspace hierarchy specified in the Merger Integration Plan is a main workspace named 'Integrated Operations' with two sub-workspaces: 'Product Development' and 'Corporate Services'. All documents moved here must have a description field of >= 20 characters. The agent must create a group called 'integrated-team' containing users from both 'alpha-team' and 'beta-team' (e.g., acohen, mgarcia, tchen) and assign this group ReadWrite permissions to the 'Integrated Operations' workspace.
